About.title: About <highlight>me</highlight>
About.paragraph1: Software engineer in training, building efficient digital solutions from scratch — with curiosity, structure, and plenty of drive.
About.paragraph2: I spend my time on real projects, constant learning, and exploring new technologies. Outside of code, video games and music remind me why it matters to create experiences that truly connect.

testimonials.title: Testimonials
testimonials.subtitle: What people say about working with me

items.name: María González
items.text: Andres demonstrated exceptional dedication in every project. His ability to solve complex problems and deliver high-quality solutions is admirable. A reliable and committed professional.

items.name: Carlos Mendoza
items.text: It is a pleasure working with Andres. His curiosity and ability to quickly learn new technologies make him stand out. He always looks for the best solution and shares his knowledge with the team.

items.name: Laura Fernández
items.text: Andres has a great ability to turn ideas into clean and functional code. His attention to detail and commitment to quality make every collaboration productive and enriching.
